name: HEALTHCARE SERVICES GROUP INC
summary: Healthcare Services Group Inc (HCSG) provides housekeeping, laundry, linen, facility maintenance, and dietary services to the healthcare industry, primarily long-term care providers such as nursing homes and assisted living facilities. The company manages these support services on behalf of its clients, handling staffing, training, and day-to-day operations of these departments within healthcare facilities.

products.name: Housekeeping Services
products.description: Managed housekeeping and laundry/linen services provided to long-term care and healthcare facilities.

products.name: Dietary Services
products.description: Food and nutritional services management provided to healthcare and long-term care facility clients.

products.name: Facility Maintenance Services
products.description: Maintenance and upkeep services provided to healthcare facilities including long-term care providers.
